calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: JPT: David May, Clerk: Karissa Shaw, Not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Peter Chan, Appellant, appearing in Pro Per.
Fred Santiago, Respondent, appearing in Pro Per.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Both litigants are sworn.

The Court questions the litigants as to the factual issues of the case.

The Court allows the litigants to give statements regarding what was said during each other's testimony.

The Court hears closing arguments and the matter is taken under submission.

JUDGMENT ENTERED 5/1/06.
